name: Crispy Deviled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup cholesterol-free egg product or Egg
1 1/2 cups dry whole wheat or white bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray a shallow roasting pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, mix the egg product, chicken broth, Dijon mustard, and finely chopped garlic.
4. In a separate container, combine the bread crumbs, fresh basil leaves, paprika, and white pepper.
5. Dip each chicken thigh into the egg mixture, shaking off any excess.
6. Coat each chicken thigh with the bread crumb mixture.
7. Place the chicken thighs in the prepared roasting pan.
8. Bake uncovered for about 20 minutes, or until the juices run clear.
9. Serve and enjoy!
